title: Version 3 Live Structure
message: The platform now includes expanded test routes, sample mocks, resources, FAQs, sharing tools and quick-start pathways.

title: Trial Classes Open
message: Students can book online or physical trial classes for MDCAT, FAST, NUST NET, NAT, GAT, IELTS and other tests.

title: Premium Notes Preview
message: Premium notes cards now show limited previews and connect directly to WhatsApp purchase requests.
